use_cases: Displaying rotating testimonials or quotes with smooth transitions
Showing cycling text for loading states or status updates
Creating animated headlines that automatically cycle through content
Building carousel-style text displays for announcements or promotions
Implementing timed content rotation in marketing pages
ai_summary: A reusable React hook (useLoop) paired with an animated text component that cycles through an array of strings with smooth vertical slide transitions using Framer Motion's AnimatePresence. The hook manages a key state that increments on a configurable delay interval, triggering re-renders that animate the text in and out. The demo component showcases the hook with Spanish countdown-style text that cycles every second.
